decision.recommended_next_task: Create a read-only controlled executor execution manifest proposal that stays blocked until explicit operator approval.
decision.reason: Activation final safety summary coverage is green, so the safest extension is a non-executing manifest proposal that preserves approval and execution boundaries.
prerequisites: Keep operator_approved = false until manual review approves execution.
Keep execution_started = false before any controlled executor handoff.
Require rollback path and validation checklist before any future execution manifest is actionable.

blocked_actions: using controlled executor activation next-safe-task decision report as execution approval
starting controlled execution from controlled executor activation next-safe-task decision report
running worker execution from controlled executor activation next-safe-task decision report
invoking a model from controlled executor activation next-safe-task decision report
rollback_path: Discard this read-only controlled executor activation next-safe-task decision report; it did not persist registry, SQLite, worker, model, approval, or execution state.
next_safe_task: Add a read-only controlled executor activation execution-manifest proposal report while keeping operator approval and execution start disabled.
